//: Merge this into .claude/settings.json — either your project's or ~/.claude/settings.json.
TIMEOUT CONTRACT: the PreToolUse timeout below (120s) MUST stay larger than
approvalTimeoutMs in the plugin's config.json (90s). The plugin has to be the
one that gives up first — that way it answers 'defer' and you get the normal
on-screen prompt. If Claude Code times out first you get a hook error instead.
The matcher must also stay in sync with gateTools in config.json. The matcher
decides what gets sent; gateTools decides what actually lights the deck.
